name: emergency_escalation
description: Send an urgent alert to the workshop owner when a caller has a safety-critical vehicle issue. Call this immediately when the caller mentions: brakes failed, steering gone, smoke, fire, fuel leak, not safe to drive, stuck on the road, or needs a tow. After calling this, tell the caller: 'I've flagged this as urgent and the team will call you back as soon as possible. If you're in immediate danger, please call triple zero.' Do not try to book a regular appointment for these situations.

caller_phone.description: The caller's phone number so the owner can call back

caller_name.description: Caller's name if they have provided it

situation.description: Brief description of the emergency in the caller's own words, e.g. 'brakes not working at all', 'smoke coming from under the bonnet', 'steering seized'

vehicle.description: Vehicle description if known, e.g. '2018 Toyota Camry rego ABC123'

location.description: Caller's current location if they have mentioned it, e.g. 'parked on Main Street Footscray', 'on the Monash Freeway'
